max_spread_pct.reason: Spread hard filter has 42% false-negative rate (5/12 rejected options were profitable). Slightly relaxing max_spread_pct may capture these.

liquidity.reason: Liquidity contributes avg 2.01 on profitable trades vs 0.00 on losses (diff=2.01, source=efficacy) — strong predictor. Raising weight 1.0 → 1.15. (efficacy only — insufficient graded data)

expiry.reason: Expiry contributes avg -0.90 on profitable trades vs -0.90 on losses (diff=0.00, source=efficacy) — weak predictor. Lowering weight 1.0 → 0.9 to reduce noise. (efficacy only — insufficient graded data)
